license.title: Open-source license
license.description: This project is released under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0). Please review the license before using, modifying, or redistributing it.
license.summaryTitle: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0
license.summaryDescription: You can review the project source and the full license text to understand the rules for use, modification, and redistribution.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language you want to use in the app.

nameGrouping.title: Random grouping
nameGrouping.description: Paste a list of names and generate groups.
nameGrouping.inputDescription: Enter one name per line. Empty lines are ignored automatically.
nameGrouping.resultDescription: Click “Generate” to see the grouped result here.
nameGrouping.namesPlaceholder:
For example:
Alice
Bob
Cindy
David
nameGrouping.groupCountHint: Names are split as evenly as possible.
nameGrouping.seedHint: Enter the same seed if you want to keep getting the same grouping.
nameGrouping.dedupeHint: If a name appears more than once, only the first one is kept.
nameGrouping.emptyDescription: Enter names and click “Generate” to see the grouping result here.

validation.emptyNames: Please enter at least one name.
validation.invalidGroupCount: Please enter a valid group count.
validation.tooManyGroups: The number of groups cannot exceed the number of names.
validation.noResults: There is no grouping result to copy yet.

nameGrouping.copySuccess: The grouping result has been copied to your clipboard.
nameGrouping.resetSuccess: The random grouping tool has been reset.

randomInsert.title: Random symbol insert
randomInsert.description: Insert symbols into your text at random and generate one or more results.
randomInsert.inputDescription: Paste the source text and list the symbols to insert, one per line.
randomInsert.resultDescription: Click “Generate” to see the output here.
randomInsert.sourcePlaceholder:
For example:
Hello world
This is a test
randomInsert.countHint: Generate several results at once if needed.
randomInsert.seedHint: Enter the same seed if you want to keep getting the same set of results.
randomInsert.emptyDescription: Enter text and symbols, then click “Generate” to see the output here.

validation.emptySymbols: Please enter at least one insert symbol.
validation.invalidCount: Please enter a valid generate count between 1 and 10000.
validation.noCharacters: The source text has no non-whitespace characters to process.
validation.noResults: There are no generated results to copy yet.

randomInsert.copySuccess: All outputs have been copied to your clipboard.
randomInsert.copySingleSuccess: This output has been copied to your clipboard.
randomInsert.resetSuccess: The random insert tool has been reset.

articleFormat.title: Article formatting
articleFormat.description: Adjust paragraph starts, blank lines, and spacing between Chinese and English.
articleFormat.editorDescription: Paste the article you want to tidy up here.
articleFormat.editorPlaceholder: Paste your article here, then use the right panel to format it.
articleFormat.workbenchDescription: Choose an action and apply it directly to the current text.

indent.countLabel: How many to insert per paragraph

blankLines.countHint: Adds the selected number of empty lines between paragraphs.
blankLines.treatEmptyLineAsParagraph: Treat existing empty lines as paragraphs
blankLines.treatEmptyLineHint: When enabled, existing empty lines are included in the process; otherwise, only paragraphs with content are changed.

cleanup.removeLeadingIndent: Remove leading indentation from each paragraph
cleanup.trimLineEndSpaces: Trim trailing spaces on each line
cleanup.removePanguSpacing: Remove spaces between CJK and Latin text

spacing.title: Add spaces between Chinese and English
spacing.description: Automatically add suitable spacing between Chinese and English or numbers.

validation.emptyIndentToken: Please enter a custom indent symbol first.
validation.noCleanupOption: Select at least one formatting item to clear.
validation.emptyText: There is no text to copy yet.
validation.cannotUndo: Nothing left to undo in this session.
validation.cannotRedo: Nothing left to redo in this session.

messages.indentApplied: Inserted the selected symbol at the start of each paragraph ({count}x).
messages.spacingApplied: Spaces between Chinese and English have been added.
messages.resetApplied: The article formatting tool has been reset.
